message:
Optimize JSON parsing and query execution

- Add parse_metadata() helper that skips parsing for empty JSON
  ("{}"/""/"null"), avoiding serde overhead for common case
- Convert 9 get_all_* methods from dynamic format! strings to
  parameterized queries with LIMIT ? (SQLite -1 = unlimited)
- Use prepare_cached() for better query plan reuse
- Safe i64::try_from() conversion with fallback to i64::MAX

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
